name: Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
shortDescription: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
shortDescription: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile blue switches and programmable macros.

name: 4K Ultra HD Monitor
shortDescription: 27-inch IPS display with HDR support and 144Hz refresh rate for smooth visuals.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
shortDescription: Adjustable lumbar support, breathable mesh back, and customizable armrests.

name: Smart Fitness Watch
shortDescription: Tracks heart rate, steps, and sleep patterns with water-resistant design.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
shortDescription: Compact waterproof speaker with 360-degree sound and 12-hour playtime.

name: USB-C Docking Station
shortDescription: Expand your connectivity with HDMI, Ethernet, USB 3.0, and SD card reader.

name: Wireless Mouse
shortDescription: Silent click technology with ergonomic design and long-lasting battery.

name: Laptop Stand
shortDescription: Aluminum alloy stand with adjustable height for better posture and cooling.

name: Webcam 1080p
shortDescription: Full HD webcam with built-in microphone and auto-light correction.
